nasb.text: All the earth was seeking the presence of Solomon, to hear his wisdom which God had put in his heart.

esv.text: And the whole earth sought the presence of Solomon to hear his wisdom, which God had put into his mind.

cnv.text: 世上所有的人都要求晉見所羅門，聆聽　神賦予他心中的智慧。

ccb.text: 天下的人都纷纷来朝见他，聆听上帝赐给他的智言慧语。
